calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME AND GENDER
Off Calendar Jun-25-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender, and issuance of new Birth Certificate.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Frank Drago, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Mary Ellen Scherer.
Petitioner: Denise Hunt present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name and gender were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Alyx Francisco Cronin and further orders the gender changed from Female to Male, and issuance of New Birth Certificate.
Decree signed in open court.
